title: My work task not showing when multiple responsible colleagues until overdue
excerpt: On “My work” tasks that have multiple responsible colleagues have not shown up on “my work” until the task has become overdue.These were tasks that were originally with another colleague but i took over responsibility an…

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
On “My work” tasks that have multiple responsible colleagues have not shown up on “my work” until the task has become overdue.These were tasks that were originally with another colleague but i took over responsibility and was also added as a responsible colleague

how does the Monday.com algorithm work on how it selects which tasks if there are more than 1000 tasks

posts.author: bbterryy (Terry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rich!

I’ve noticed there is a delay for work showing up in “My Work”.

Some suggestions:

  1. Did you double check to see if there are any automations that may be causing this block?
  2. Try removing the deadline feature and re-activating it after re-assigning all dates to refresh the board (as much of a hassle that may be)

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bbterryy thanks for reply

Doesn’t seem to be any automation’s

That does sound llke a hassle.

Think its down to to many tasks for My work so it then omits some but there doesnt seem to be a patter on it
